attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         ,
  BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME ,   
  BKG_TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  
 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SOL_END_CUSTOMER_MODIFIED  END_CUST
  ON BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='ERP'  AND   BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <> 'CLOUD-CBM'

SELECT 
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY           ,
   BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY                ,
   BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,
   BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                    ,
   BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                ,
   BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
   END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
   BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
   BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
   BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
   BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME           ,
   BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            ,
   BKG_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER               ,
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE          ,
   BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
   BKG_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT      ,
   BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,
   BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT        ,
   BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE           ,
   BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE             ,
   BKG_TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE         ,
   BKG_TRX.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE            ,
   BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                ,
   BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE   ,
   BKG_TRX.CANCELLED_FLG                  ,
   BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_FLG                ,
   BKG_TRX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG            ,
   BKG_TRX.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG         ,
   BKG_TRX.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         ,
   BKG_TRX.OVERLAY_FLG                    ,
   BKG_TRX.IC_REVENUE_FLG                 ,
   BKG_TRX.CHARGES_FLG                    ,
   BKG_TRX.SALESREP_FLG                   ,
   BKG_TRX.MISC_FLG                       ,
   BKG_TRX.SERVICE_FLG                    ,
   BKG_TRX.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG         ,
   BKG_TRX.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG           ,
   BKG_TRX.REVENUE_FLG                    ,
   BKG_TRX.RMA_FLG                        ,
   BKG_TRX.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT                ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT    ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT         ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY           ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT  ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT    ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY      ,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT  ,
   BKG_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT         ,
   CASE 
    WHEN BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY = -777 
     THEN BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
    ELSE END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
    END AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   BKG_TRX.CANCEL_CODE,
   BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER                ,
   USER  EDW_UPDATE_USER                ,
   BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
   BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_RT, 
   BKG_TRX.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
   BKG_TRX.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
   BKG_TRX.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
   BKG_TRX.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
   BKG_TRX.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
   BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_DT,
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,   /**R9**/
   BKG_TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,   /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
   BKG_TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,            /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
   BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,            /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
   BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,     /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
   BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,      /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
   BKG_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,   /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
   BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
  BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
  BKG_TRX.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
  BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
  BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
  BKG_TRX.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
  BKG_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
  BKG_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
  COALESCE(BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS  DV_DEAL_ID, /*added for DEAL_ID*/
 BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY ,       
  BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT ,      
  BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT ,           
  BKG_TRX.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT   ,
  BKG_TRX.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
  BKG_TRX.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
  BKG_TRX.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
  BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT, /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
  BKG_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD, /* Added as part of NRS MPOB Changes */
  BKG_TRX.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /* Added as part of NRS PI3 Changes */
  BKG_TRX.SALES_MOTION_CD, /* Added as part of Oct - 2017 rel */
  BKG_TRX.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG,  /* Added as part of Oct - 2017 rel */
  BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
  BKG_TRX.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
  BKG_TRX.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY ,/* Added as part of SALES FY18 May20Rel */
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
  ,BKG_TRX.DV_INV_DTM
  ,BKG_TRX.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
 ,BKG_TRX.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
  ,BKG_TRX.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
  ,BKG_TRX.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
  /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
  ,BKG_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
  ,BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKG_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKG_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BKG_TRX.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME 
,BKG_TRX.TOTAL_NETPC_WTHOUT_CR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.FIRST_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.MULTI_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
   FROM 
  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_N_DRVD_END_CUST_MODIFIED END_CUST
   ON BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY= END_CUST.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY AND
   BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE= END_CUST.PROCESS_DATE AND 
  BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE='ERP'
  AND  BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <> 'CLOUD-CBM'

SELECT 
	SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
	END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
	START_TV_DATETIME             ,
	START_SSP_DATE                ,
	END_TV_DATETIME               ,
	END_SSP_DATE                  ,
	END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE        ,
	SS_CODE                       ,
	END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL      ,
	EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
	EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME        ,   
	EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER_TV END_CUST
WHERE 
END_CUST.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >'$$LastExtractDate' 
	AND  END_CUST.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'

SELECT 
     BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY           ,
     BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY                ,
     BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,
     BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                    ,
     BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                ,
     BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
     BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
     BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
     BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
     BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
     BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME           ,
     BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            ,
     BKG_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER               ,
     BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE          ,
     BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
     BKG_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT      ,
     BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,
     BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT        ,
     BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE           ,
     BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE             ,
     BKG_TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE         ,
     BKG_TRX.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE            ,
     BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                ,
     BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE   ,
     BKG_TRX.CANCELLED_FLG                  ,
     BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_FLG                ,
     BKG_TRX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG            ,
     BKG_TRX.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG         ,
     BKG_TRX.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         ,
     BKG_TRX.OVERLAY_FLG                    ,
     BKG_TRX.IC_REVENUE_FLG                 ,
     BKG_TRX.CHARGES_FLG                    ,
     BKG_TRX.SALESREP_FLG                   ,
     BKG_TRX.MISC_FLG                       ,
     BKG_TRX.SERVICE_FLG                    ,
     BKG_TRX.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG         ,
     BKG_TRX.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG           ,
     BKG_TRX.REVENUE_FLG                    ,
     BKG_TRX.RMA_FLG                        ,
     BKG_TRX.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT                ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT    ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT         ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY           ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT  ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT    ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY      ,
     BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT  ,
     BKG_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT         ,
     BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
     BKG_TRX.CANCEL_CODE,
     BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER                ,
     USER  EDW_UPDATE_USER                ,
     BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
     BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_RT, 
     BKG_TRX.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
     BKG_TRX.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
     BKG_TRX.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
     BKG_TRX.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
     BKG_TRX.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
     BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_DT,
     BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,   /**R9**/
     BKG_TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,   /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
     BKG_TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,            /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
     BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,            /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
     BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,     /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
     BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,      /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
     BKG_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,   /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
     BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
     BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
     BKG_TRX.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
     BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
     BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
     BKG_TRX.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
     BKG_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
     BKG_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
     COALESCE(BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS  DV_DEAL_ID, /*added for DEAL_ID*/
     BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY ,       
  BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT ,      
  BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT ,           
  BKG_TRX.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT      ,
     BKG_TRX.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
     BKG_TRX.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
     BKG_TRX.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT 
,BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
  ,BKG_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD /* Added as part of NRS MPOB Changes */
 ,BKG_TRX.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* Added as part of NRS PI3 Changes */
 ,BKG_TRX.SALES_MOTION_CD, /* Added as part of Oct - 2017 rel */
   BKG_TRX.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG,  /* Added as part of Oct - 2017 rel */
   BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
   BKG_TRX.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
   BKG_TRX.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY, /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May20Rel */
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE,
   BKG_TRX.DV_INV_DTM,
   BKG_TRX.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM,
   BKG_TRX.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE, /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
   BKG_TRX.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
   BKG_TRX.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD, /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
   /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
   BKG_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT,
   BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,
BKG_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
BKG_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,
BKG_TRX.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,BKG_TRX.TOTAL_NETPC_WTHOUT_CR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.FIRST_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.MULTI_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
   
     FROM 
     $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
     INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  NTPCF ON NTPCF.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY = BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY  
 
  INNER JOIN (     
  SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG = 'Y'      
  UNION      
  SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG = 'Y'      
  AND 1 =( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR WHERE DATE= FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE AND CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG ='Y')     
  ) FISC_MTH ON FISC_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
   
     INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PRDT_COST_FACT_EXTRT_DT  WIPCFED ON WIPCFED.JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_BOOKINGS_ERP_EC_RETRO' 
     AND NTPCF.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE  AND NTPCF.EDW_CREATE_DTM <=  WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
 
     WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' AND BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <> 'CLOUD-CBM'
     AND NOT EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BOOKINGS_ERP_EC_RETRO WINBAR
     WHERE  BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = WINBAR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND
     BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = WINBAR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AND
     BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = WINBAR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE)

SELECT 
      BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY           ,
      BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY                ,
      BKG_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           ,
      BKG_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                    ,
      BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                ,
      BKG_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                     ,
      BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY               ,
      BKG_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
      BKG_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
      BKG_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY           ,
      BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME           ,
      BKG_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY            ,
      BKG_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER               ,
      BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE          ,
      BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
      BKG_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT      ,
      BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT   ,
      BKG_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT        ,
      BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE           ,
      BKG_TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE             ,
      BKG_TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE         ,
      BKG_TRX.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE            ,
      BKG_TRX.ADJUSTMENT_CODE                ,
      BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE   ,
      BKG_TRX.CANCELLED_FLG                  ,
      BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_FLG                ,
      BKG_TRX.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG            ,
      BKG_TRX.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG         ,
      BKG_TRX.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         ,
      BKG_TRX.OVERLAY_FLG                    ,
      BKG_TRX.IC_REVENUE_FLG                 ,
      BKG_TRX.CHARGES_FLG                    ,
      BKG_TRX.SALESREP_FLG                   ,
      BKG_TRX.MISC_FLG                       ,
      BKG_TRX.SERVICE_FLG                    ,
      BKG_TRX.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG         ,
      BKG_TRX.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG           ,
      BKG_TRX.REVENUE_FLG                    ,
      BKG_TRX.RMA_FLG                        ,
      BKG_TRX.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT                ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT    ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT   ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT         ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY           ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT  ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT    ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY      ,
      BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT  ,
      BKG_TRX.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT         ,
      BKG_TRX.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
      BKG_TRX.CANCEL_CODE,
      BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER                ,
      USER  EDW_UPDATE_USER                ,
      BKG_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME            ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
      BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_RT, 
      BKG_TRX.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
      BKG_TRX.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
      BKG_TRX.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
      BKG_TRX.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
      BKG_TRX.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
      BKG_TRX.CONVERSION_DT,
      BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,   /**R9**/
      BKG_TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,   /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
      BKG_TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,            /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
      BKG_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,            /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
      BKG_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,     /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
      BKG_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,      /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
      BKG_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,   /*Added as part of Offer Attribution project*/
      BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
      BKG_TRX.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
      BKG_TRX.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
      BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
      BKG_TRX.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
      BKG_TRX.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
      BKG_TRX.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
      BKG_TRX.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
      COALESCE(BKG_TRX.DV_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS  DV_DEAL_ID, /*added for DEAL_ID*/
      BKG_TRX.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY ,       
   BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT ,      
   BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT ,           
   BKG_TRX.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
    BKG_TRX.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
     BKG_TRX.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
     BKG_TRX.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
	BKG_TRX.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT, /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */  
	BKG_TRX.POB_TYPE_CD, /* Added as part of NRS MPOB Changes */
	BKG_TRX.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /* Added as part of NRS PI3 Changes */
	BKG_TRX.SALES_MOTION_CD, /* Added as part of Oct - 2017 rel */
	BKG_TRX.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG,  /* Added as part of Oct - 2017 rel */
	BKG_TRX.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
	BKG_TRX.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
      BKG_TRX.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,  /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
	  BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE,
   BKG_TRX.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
   ,BKG_TRX.DV_INV_DTM
   ,BKG_TRX.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
   ,BKG_TRX.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
   ,BKG_TRX.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
   ,BKG_TRX.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
   /*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
   ,BKG_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
   ,BKG_TRX.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKG_TRX.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKG_TRX.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,BKG_TRX.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,BKG_TRX.TOTAL_NETPC_WTHOUT_CR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.FIRST_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.MULTI_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,BKG_TRX.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
      FROM 
      $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE BKG_TRX
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER END_CUST
  ON BKG_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
  
   INNER JOIN (     
   SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG = 'Y'      
   UNION      
   SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR WHERE PREVIOUS_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG = 'Y'      
   AND 1 =( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR WHERE DATE= FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE AND CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG ='Y')     
   ) FISC_MTH ON FISC_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = BKG_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
    
      INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PRDT_COST_FACT_EXTRT_DT  WIPCFED ON WIPCFED.JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_BOOKINGS_ERP_EC_RETRO_ENDCOUNTRY' 
      AND END_CUST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE  AND END_CUST.EDW_CREATE_DTM <=  WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
  
      WHERE BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' AND BKG_TRX.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <> 'CLOUD-CBM'
      AND NOT EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_BOOKINGS_ERP_EC_RETRO WINBAR
      WHERE  BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = WINBAR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND
      BKG_TRX.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = WINBAR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AND
      BKG_TRX.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = WINBAR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE)
